momentum.Name: Momentum
momentum.Description: Gain +8% damage per consecutive hit on same target, up to ×1.4. Resets on target switch.

overkill.Name: Overkill
overkill.Description: 60% excess damage from a kill spills to the next enemy in the lane.

slow.Name: Chill Shot
slow.Description: On hit: −25% move speed for 5 s. Stacks multiplicatively on same tower.

split_shot.Name: Split Shot
split_shot.Description: On hit, fires 2 projectiles at nearby enemies for 55% damage each. Each additional copy fires one more.

feedback_loop.Name: Feedback Loop
feedback_loop.Description: Killing an enemy reduces this tower's current cooldown by 25%.

chain_reaction.Name: Chain Reaction
chain_reaction.Description: After hitting a target, the attack jumps to 1 nearby enemy for 55% damage. Stacks: each copy adds 1 more bounce.
